fields.name: progTypeNames
fields.description: Refer to one-tasking online documentation at http://www.intelligence-airbusds.com/ for more information

fields.name: acquisitionDate
fields.description: A date or date interval that must match the product acquisition date. Only taskings in this range are returned in the response. Example: [2017-01-01,2017-02-01[ to select all taskings done in January 2017.

fields.name: icrEndOfPeriodDate
fields.description: A date or date interval that must match the icr end of period date. Only taskings in this range are returned in the response. Example: [2017-01-01,2017-02-01[ to select all taskings done in January 2017.

fields.name: hasProposedSegments
fields.description: Indicates whether the search should filter on proposed segments. If set to true, only ICR with proposed segments should be returned. If set to false, only ICR with no proposed segments. If not set, returns all ICR ignoring presence/absence of proposed segments

fields.name: startPage
fields.description: The desired page, starting from 1 for the first page.

fields.name: sortKeys
fields.description: A sorting request to the server conforming the OpenSearch SRU specification. Example: sortKeys=acquisitionDate,,0 meaning a request to sort by newest acquired image first or sortKeys=cloudCover,,1 to sort by the smallest cloud coverage percentage. Available values are: status, startDate, endDate, taskingProgress
